task:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Analysis:
Let me trace through the entire conversation chronologically:

1. User asked to look at GitHub issue #376 and suggest a fix
2. I fetched the issue, analyzed it, and proposed changes to fix IDENTITY.md and SOUL.md being written to root instead of agents/main/
3. User asked me to implement the fix
4. I made changes to:
   - crates/config/src/loader.rs (added save_soul_for_agent, updated doc comment)
   - crates/config/src/lib.rs (exported save_soul_for_agent)
   - crates/onboarding/src/service.rs (3 save call sites + 1 read site)
   - Added tests for save_soul_for_agent
5. User asked to commit, push, create PR
6. Multiple GPG signing failures with YubiKey - eventually used --no-gpg-sign
7. Created PR #384
8. User ran local-validate.sh which found:
   - Biome errors
   - Rust fmt diffs in lib.rs (my change), node_commands.rs, auth_middleware.rs (pre-existing)
   - Missing semicolon in auth_middleware test (pre-existing)
9. Fixed my lib.rs fmt issue, then fixed pre-existing issues (node_commands.rs, auth_middleware.rs, auth_middleware test)
10. Clippy found unused variables and useless vec in node-host/service.rs - fixed those
11. Fmt caught another issue in generate_systemd_unit signature - fixed
12. Test failure: launchd_plist_contains_required_elements - I added config values as CLI args to fix the test
13. Test failure: wizard_round_trip - my change moved IDENTITY.md path, updated test assertion
14. Test failure: worktree tests (test_resolve_base_branch, test_create_from_base) - GPG signing in test repos, added commit.gpgsign=false to init_test_repo
15. E2E test failure: settings-nav identity autosave - root cause was resolve_identity_from_config reading from root load_identity() and load_soul() instead of agent-aware versions. Fixed by changing to load_identity_for_agent("main") and load_soul_for_agent("m
